2026 in Legacy Fighting Alliance
Information
First dateJanuary 16, 2026
Events
Fights
Chronology
2025 in LFA 2026 in Legacy Fighting Alliance 2027 in LFA

The year 2026 is the tenth year in the history of Legacy Fighting Alliance (LFA) a mixed martial arts promotion based in the United States.[1]

Background

[edit]

On January 7, 2026, it was announced that the promotion has officially parted ways with UFC Fight Pass and signed a new broadcast deal with Vice TV, which will air 25 events in 2026. This marking a significant shift for the regional promotion as the UFC also cut ties with several other regional partners.[2]

List of events

[edit]
# Event Date Venue Location
1 LFA 224: Adams vs. Bilalov Jan 16, 2026 Mystic Lake Casino Hotel Prior Lake, Minnesota, U.S.
2 LFA 225: Degli vs. Aguiar Jan 23, 2026 Nilson Nelson Gymnasium Brasília, Brazil
3 LFA 226: Allakhverdiev vs. Kropschot Feb 6, 2026 F&M Bank Arena Clarksville, Tennessee, U.S.
4 LFA 227: Nascimento vs. Kamikubo Feb 27, 2026 Ventura County Fairgrounds Ventura, California, U.S.
5 LFA 228: Natividad vs. Garcia Mar 13, 2026 Gila River Resorts and Casinos – Wild Horse Pass Chandler, Arizona, U.S.
6 LFA 229: Martins vs. Gonçalves Mar 27, 2026 Centro Esportivo Pelezão São Paulo, Brazil
7 LFA 230: Bartling vs. Cleveland Apr 3, 2026 Grand Casino Hotel & Resort Shawnee, Oklahoma, U.S.
8 LFA 231: Lozej vs. Ibarra Apr 17, 2026 Mystic Lake Casino Hotel Prior Lake, Minnesota, U.S.
9 LFA 232: Visconde vs. Pintos May 15, 2026 Foxwoods Resort Casino Mashantucket, Connecticut, U.S.
10 LFA 233: Piersma vs. Camillo May 22, 2026 Seneca Allegany Casino Salamanca, New York, U.S.
11 LFA 234: Fernando vs. Soares May 29, 2026 Nilson Nelson Gymnasium Brasília, Brazil

LFA 224: Adams vs. Bilalov

[edit]
LFA 224: Adams vs. Bilalov
PromotionLegacy Fighting Alliance
DateJanuary 16, 2026
VenueMystic Lake Casino Hotel
CityPrior Lake, Minnesota, United States

LFA 224: Adams vs. Bilalov was a mixed martial arts event promoted by Legacy Fighting Alliance that took place on January 16, 2026, in Prior Lake, Minnesota, United States.

Background

[edit]

A LFA Heavyweight Championship bout for the vacant title between Matt Adams and Arslan Bilalov headlined the event.[3]

Results

[edit]
Main card (Vice TV)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Heavyweight Arslan Bilalov def. Matt Adams Submission (rear-naked choke) 1 4:47 [a]
Welterweight Josiah Harrell def. Bekmyrza Dosmatov TKO (corner stoppage) 3 3:28
Women's Strawweight Giovanna Canuto def. Janaína Silva Submission (face crank) 3 2:38
Featherweight Taner Trembley def. Shaheen Santana Submission (guillotine choke) 1 3:32
Lightweight Canon Swanson def. Jimmy Washington Technical Submission (arm-triangle choke) 1 2:59
Featherweight Abbas Abasov def. Jose Intriago TKO (head kick and punches) 2 3:39
Preliminary card (LFA Fight Network)
Middleweight Tyree Overton def. Pedro Trujillo Decision (unanimous) (29–28, 29–28, 29–28) 3 5:00
Heavyweight Ezayah Gomez Oropeza def. Braden Peterson Submission (kimura) 1 1:02
Catchweight (150 lb) Noah Gasho def. David McKinney TKO (punches) 2 2:27
Lightweight Mitchell Wilson def. Sedric Richard Submission (arm-triangle choke) 1 1:20
Lightweight McCoy Tekautz def. Hykeem Green KO (punches) 1 0:21
Amateur bouts
Lightweight Xavier Judge def. Alex Martin Decision (unanimous) (30–26, 30–26, 30–26) 3 3:00
Middleweight Cadin Vowels def. Armani Webster Decision (unanimous) (29–28, 30–27, 30–26) 3 3:00
Women's Featherweight Daysi Perez def. Jessie Hays Submission (rear-naked choke) 3 1:26
  1. ^ For the vacant LFA Heavyweight Championship.

LFA 225: Degli vs. Aguiar

[edit]
LFA 225: Degli vs. Aguiar
PromotionLegacy Fighting Alliance
DateJanuary 23, 2026
VenueNilson Nelson Gymnasium
CityBrasília, Brazil

LFA 225: Degli vs. Aguiar was a mixed martial arts event promoted by Legacy Fighting Alliance that took place on January 23, 2026, in Brasília, Brazil.

Background

[edit]

An interim LFA Flyweight Championship bout between interim champion Marcos Degli and Luís Aguiar headlined the event.[4] At the weigh-ins, Aguiar weighed in at 125.8 pounds, 0.8 pounds over the title fight limit. His bout proceeded as a one-sided title bout, scheduled for five rounds, with only reigning interim champion Degli was eligible crowned the interim title.[5]

Results

[edit]
Main card (Vice TV)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Flyweight Marcos Degli (ic) def. Luís Aguiar KO (punch to the body) 1 1:35 [a]
Bantamweight Derick Garcia Borges def. Daniel Araújo Decision (unanimous) (30–25, 29–26, 29–26) 3 5:00
Bantamweight Rafael Pereira def. Lionel Abojer Technical Submission (rear-naked choke) 3 3:28
Middleweight Julio Cesar Spadaccini def. Marcio Cabral TKO (punches) 1 2:34
Light Heavyweight Leon Soares def. Miguel Porto Submission (rear-naked choke) 1 4:59
Featherweight Aristides Vinícius def. Icaro Brito Decision (unanimous) (30–27, 29–28, 29–28) 3 5:00
Welterweight Gabriel Vinicius def. Joel Salviano Decision (unanimous) (30–25, 30–26, 30–26) 3 5:00
Preliminary card (LFA Fight Network)
Middleweight Gustavo Rocha def. Vladimir Calvo Marrero Decision (unanimous) (30–27, 29–28, 29–28) 3 5:00
Women's Flyweight Bianca Basílio def. Jéssica Oliveira Submission (armbar) 1 4:58 [b]
Catchweight (130 lb) Frank da Silva Castro def. João Menezes Decision (unanimous) (30–27, 30–27, 30–27) 3 5:00 [c]
Featherweight Leonardo Cerboni def. Lucas Silva Cruz Submission (rear-naked choke) 1 4:13 [d]
Bantamweight Breno Yuri Santos def. Lucas Sousa Andrade Submission (triangle choke) 2 1:21
Catchweight (159 lb) Italo Cruz def. Vinicius Silva TKO (elbows) 2 1:58 [e]
Lightweight Pedro Victor de Souza def. Lucas Almeida Barreto Decision (unanimous) (29–28, 29–28, 30–27) 3 5:00
  1. ^ For the interim LFA Flyweight Championship.
  2. ^ Oliveira missed weight (128.6 lb).
  3. ^ Menezes missed weight (134 lb).
  4. ^ Cerboni missed weight (147.8 lb).
  5. ^ Silva missed weight (166 lb).

LFA 226: Allakhverdiev vs. Kropschot

[edit]
LFA 226: Allakhverdiev vs. Kropschot
PromotionLegacy Fighting Alliance
DateFebruary 6, 2026
VenueF&M Bank Arena
CityClarksville, Tennessee, United States

LFA 226: Allakhverdiev vs. Kropschot was a mixed martial arts event promoted by Legacy Fighting Alliance that took place on February 6, 2026, in Clarksville, Tennessee, United States.

Background

[edit]

The event marked the promotion's second visit to Clarksville and first since LFA 219 in October 2025.[6]

A LFA Middleweight Championship bout between current champion David Allakhverdiev and Joseph Kropschot headlined the event.[7]

LFA 227: Nascimento vs. Kamikubo

PromotionLegacy Fighting Alliance
DateFebruary 27, 2026
VenueVentura County Fairgrounds
CityVentura, California, United States

LFA 227: Nascimento vs. Kamikubo was a mixed martial arts event promoted by Legacy Fighting Alliance that took place on February 27, 2026, in Ventura, California, United States.

Background

[edit]

The event marked the promotion's second visit to Ventura and first since LFA 215 in August 2025.[8]

The event headliner featured a bantamweight bout between Rafael do Nascimento and Shuya Kamikubo.[9]

LFA 228: Natividad vs. Garcia

[edit]
LFA 228: Natividad vs. Garcia
PromotionLegacy Fighting Alliance
DateMarch 13, 2026
VenueGila River Resorts and Casinos – Wild Horse Pass
CityChandler, Arizona, United States

LFA 228: Natividad vs. Garcia was a mixed martial arts event promoted by Legacy Fighting Alliance that took place on March 13, 2026, in Chandler, Arizona, United States.

Background

[edit]

The event marked the promotion's fourth visit to Chandler and first since LFA 188 in July 2024.[10]

A flyweight bout between undefeated prospect Christian Natividad and Adrian Garcia headlined the event.[11]

LFA 229: Martins vs. Gonçalves was a mixed martial arts event promoted by Legacy Fighting Alliance that took place on March 29, 2026, in São Paulo, Brazil.

LFA 230: Bartling vs. Cleveland

[edit]
LFA 230: Bartling vs. Cleveland
PromotionLegacy Fighting Alliance
DateApril 3, 2026
VenueGrand Casino Hotel & Resort
CityShawnee, Oklahoma, United States

LFA 230: Bartling vs. Cleveland was a mixed martial arts event promoted by Legacy Fighting Alliance that took place on April 3, 2026, in Shawnee, Oklahoma, United States.

Background

[edit]

The event marked the promotion's 15th visit to Shawnee and first since LFA 152 in February 2023.[14]

A bantamweight bout between Xavier Franklin and returning veteran Micaias Ureña was scheduled to headline the event.[15] However, the bout has been scratched for unknown reasons.[16]

As a results, a heavyweight bout between Nyle Bartling and Charlie Cleveland served as the new main event.[16]

Results

[edit]
Main card (Vice TV)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Heavyweight Charlie Cleveland def. Nyle Bartling KO (punches) 1 3:09
Middleweight David Wright def. John Moore Submission (rear-naked choke) 1 4:43
Middleweight Jake Woodley def. Shane Sobnosky Jr. Decision (unanimous) (30–27, 30–26, 30–24) 3 5:00
Featherweight Elias Rodriguez def. Nick Fields TKO (punches) 1 0:36
Catchweight (195 lb) Finn Martin def. Chris Conners TKO (punches) 3 3:41
Preliminary card (YouTube / Spectation Sports)
Welterweight Austin Miller def. Ethan Moore TKO (elbow and punches) 2 3:24
Catchweight (138 lb) Nicholas O'Brien def. Jose Intriago Decision (unanimous) (29–28, 29–28, 29–28) 3 5:00
Featherweight Malik Thompson def. Alpha Yero Mansare TKO (elbows) 3 3:18
Amateur bouts
Bantamweight Jason Eubanks def. Gage Nolan Submission (kneebar) 1 2:48
Lightweight Garrett Gean def. Carson Rodnett Submission (armbar) 2 2:14
Flyweight Kanean Catron def. Joseph Hobbs Submission (guillotine choke) 1 0:49

LFA 231: Lozej vs. Ibarra

[edit]
LFA 231: Lozej vs. Ibarra
PromotionLegacy Fighting Alliance
DateApril 17, 2026
VenueMystic Lake Casino Hotel
CityPrior Lake, Minnesota, United States

LFA 231: Lozej vs. Ibarra was a mixed martial arts event promoted by Legacy Fighting Alliance that took place on April 17, 2026, in Prior Lake, Minnesota, United States.

Background

[edit]

A featherweight bout between Taner Trembley and former LFA Featherweight Champion Elijah Johns was scheduled to headline the event.[17] However, Johns withdrew from the event due to an illness. As a result, Trembley faced Korey Taylor, who scheduled to face Daniel Holt (also withdrew due to weight issues) in a 160-pound catchweight bout after both fighters weighed in at similar weights.[18]

The event was promoted a flyweight bout between Devon Lozej and Ernesto Ibarra to served as the new headliner.[18]

Results

[edit]
Main card (Vice TV)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Flyweight Devon Lozej def. Ernesto Ibarra TKO (punches) 2 1:46
Catchweight (160 lb) Taner Trembley def. Korey Taylor TKO (knees and punches) 2 2:25
Lightweight Nikita Kulshin def. Junior Melo TKO (punches) 1 0:36
Lightweight Steve Collins def. Cole Faust Decision (unanimous) (29–28, 29–28, 30–27) 3 5:00
Heavyweight Richard Harris def. Philip Latu Submission (guillotine choke) 2 4:01
Lightweight Canon Swanson def. Quintin Richards TKO (body kick and punches) 1 2:01
Preliminary card (YouTube / Spectation Sports)
Lightweight Kelton Sneve def. Cedric Katambwa Decision (unanimous) (29–28, 29–28, 29–28) 3 5:00
Catchweight (150 lb) Noah Gasho def. Miljan Djukanovic Decision (unanimous) (30–27, 29–28, 29–28) 3 5:00
Flyweight Oscar Jurado Sánchez def. Yermakhan Oryntaev KO (head kick) 1 0:15 [a]
Heavyweight Ezayah Gomez Oropeza def. Lorenzo Figueroa TKO (body kick and punches) 1 1:46
Lightweight Ralph Hernandez III def. Jeremiah Huff TKO (punches) 1 4:53
Amateur bouts
Catchweight (150 lb) Samuel Bailey Jr. def. Santana Acosta TKO (body kick and punches) 3 2:55
Flyweight Gunnar Nelson def. Erick Medrano Submission (rear-naked choke) 1 1:58
Women's Featherweight Kayara Hartfield def. Jessie Hays TKO (punches) 2 0:45
  1. ^ Oryntaev missed weight (127.4 lb).

LFA 232: Visconde vs. Pintos

[edit]
LFA 232: Visconde vs. Pintos
PromotionLegacy Fighting Alliance
DateMay 15, 2026
VenueFoxwoods Resort Casino
CityMashantucket, Connecticut, United States

LFA 232: Visconde vs. Pintos is an upcoming mixed martial arts event promoted by Legacy Fighting Alliance that will take place on May 15, 2026, in Mashantucket, Connecticut, United States.

Background

[edit]

The event will mark the promotion's third visit to Mashantucket and first since LFA 222 in November 2025.[19]

A LFA Featherweight Championship bout for the vacant title between Erick Visconde and Gustavo Pintos is scheduled to headline the event.[19]

Fight card

[edit]
Main card (Vice TV)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Featherweight Erick Visconde vs. Gustavo Pintos [a]
Lightweight Nathan Ghareeb vs. Vinicius Sacchelli Cenci
Lightweight Adam Livingston vs. Kyle Pufahl
Lightweight Ansar Khamzaev vs. Jordon Tague
Lightweight Ednilson Santos vs. Justin Montalvo
Welterweight Luis Francischinelli vs. Travis Arrellano
Preliminary card (YouTube / Spectation Sports)
Lightweight Regivaldo Carvalho vs. Abbas Abasov
Middleweight Guram Gochashvili vs. Willer Alves
Women's Strawweight Ashley Barrett vs. Sophie Lang
Welterweight Melvin Jovel vs. Elton Dedaj
Featherweight Rodrigo Brauna vs. David Evenson
Light Heavyweight Austin Ross vs. Trevor Linderman
  1. ^ For the vacant LFA Featherweight Championship.

LFA 233: Piersma vs. Camillo

[edit]
LFA 233: Piersma vs. Camillo
PromotionLegacy Fighting Alliance
DateMay 22, 2026
VenueSeneca Allegany Casino
CitySalamanca, New York, United States

LFA 233: Piersma vs. Camillo is an upcoming mixed martial arts event promoted by Legacy Fighting Alliance that will take place on May 22, 2026, in Salamanca, New York, United States.

Background

[edit]

The event will mark the promotion's third visit to Salamanca and first since LFA 211 in June 2025.[20]

A LFA Welterweight Championship bout between current champion Jonathan Piersma and Martin Camilo is scheduled to headline the event.[21]

In addition, a LFA Lightweight Championship bout between current champion Richie Miranda and Robert Varricchio is scheduled to serve as the co-main event.[21]

Fight card

[edit]
Main card (Vice TV)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Welterweight Jonathan Piersma (c) vs. Martin Camilo [a]
Lightweight Richie Miranda (c) vs. Robert Varricchio [b]
Featherweight Eliab Evangelista vs. Soufiane Kabil
Lightweight Kevin Carrier vs. Zaki Mohsin
Lightweight Jack Sheehan vs. Xavier Zeruth
  1. ^ For the LFA Welterweight Championship.
  2. ^ For the LFA Lightweight Championship.

LFA 234: Fernando vs. Soares

[edit]
LFA 234: Fernando vs. Soares
PromotionLegacy Fighting Alliance
DateMay 29, 2026
VenueNilson Nelson Gymnasium
CityBrasília, Brazil

LFA 234: Fernando vs. Soares is an upcoming mixed martial arts event promoted by Legacy Fighting Alliance that will take place on May 29, 2026, in Brasília, Brazil.

Background

[edit]

A LFA Light Heavyweight Championship bout between current champion (also former LFA Middleweight Champion) Lucas Fernando and Leon Soares is scheduled to headline the event.

An interim LFA Lightweight Championship bout between current interim champion Jefferson Nascimento and Gian Maurente is scheduled to serve as the co-main event.

Fight card

[edit]
Main card (Vice TV)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Light Heavyweight Lucas Fernando (c) vs. Leon Soares [a]
Lightweight Jefferson Nascimento (ic) vs. Gian Maurente [b]
  1. ^ For the LFA Light Heavyweight Championship.
  2. ^ For the interim LFA Lightweight Championship.
